  1. 1. Application
  2. 2. Job offer
  3. 2. Form I-9
  4. 3. Form W-4
  5. 4. Union docs (optional)
  6. Done

Step 1 of 5

Employment application

Complete all sections below. Fields marked with * are required.

Sign in or create an account

Your application is saved to your USIS account so you can finish on any device.

Sign in Create account

Application saved — you can continue to Form I-9 using the steps above or Save and continue below.

Personal Information

Position & Availability

Are you legally authorized to work in the United States? *
Will you now or in the future require sponsorship for employment? *

Address

Education

Employment History

List your most recent employers (up to 4). Include at least one complete entry.

Skills & Qualifications

Emergency Contact

Additional Information

Have you ever been convicted of a felony? *
Social Security number, date of birth, citizenship status, and tax withholding are collected on Form I-9 and Form W-4 — not on this employment application.

Certification & Signature

Application completed and signed — Form I-9 and Form W-4 are on file.
Back Continue
© US Interior Specialties
Review and Sign — Application, I-9, and W-4

Review your employment application before completing Form I-9 and Form W-4.

Complete Form I-9 Section 1, including date of birth, SSN, and citizenship status.

Complete Form W-4, including filing status and withholding elections.

Save Form I-9 and Form W-4 first, then sign each form electronically.

Sign Form I-9 Section 1
Sign Form W-4
